testcase.name: test_01_set_project_location
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_attendance_feature.py:209: in setup assert login_resp.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {login_resp.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
